recent_calls.summary: The user, Ekalene from American Home Shield, called to provide upgrade information for a member regarding an air conditioner upgrade. The agent confirmed details, collected contact information, and agreed to have the team contact the member with all upgrade details. The user was satisfied and provided positive feedback before ending the call.

The user, Steven Stern, contacted Budget to schedule an urgent plumbing appointment for leaks at the main water line and washing machine. The agent successfully booked a service slot for the same afternoon at 4 PM and confirmed the details with the user. The call concluded with the user declining to provide feedback but expressing gratitude.
The user, Angela, called in referencing a previous call she received. The agent, Sophie, attempted to assist but transferred the call to another number for further help.

Tracy Campbell called to report a leaking upstairs toilet that has caused water damage and needs urgent plumbing service in the afternoons. The agent attempted to transfer her to a live emergency specialist but was unsuccessful, so the issue was escalated for a callback. Tracy requested to be contacted via text instead of a phone call due to being at the DMV.

Jamie White called to check if someone was on their way to their house after missing a call. The agent confirmed Jamie's identity and phone number but could not find any appointment under the provided information. Jamie declined to leave a message or be transferred to a live representative.
The user called back after missing a previous call from Budget. The agent acknowledged the callback and proceeded to transfer the user to a live agent for further assistance.

Suzanne Dellman called to inquire about a warranty for her Lenox air conditioner, which is about five years old and has a compressor issue. The agent gathered basic information and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to request AC servicing at their address in Belleville, Illinois, providing their contact details and preferred appointment times. The agent confirmed the information and assured the user that the request would be passed to the team for follow-up. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further assistance needed.

The user, Roy, called to get in touch with the head of accounting or finance manager. The agent, Sophie, informed him she couldn't access billing information directly but transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.
The user requested to speak with someone in the office, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to reschedule an air conditioner service appointment originally set up by his wife through a home warranty. The agent collected all necessary details, including the service address, user contact information, and preferred reschedule dates. The user declined additional information about maintenance programs, and the agent confirmed that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him soon to assist with rescheduling.

The user called to speak with someone in the office, but the agent was unable to connect them to a live representative. The agent offered to take the user's information for a follow-up, but the user declined and decided to try texting instead.
The user called and requested to speak to Ryan. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate agent.

The user called and requested to speak with Sonny and then human resources. The agent attempted to assist by transferring the call to a live agent who could help. The call was successfully transferred to another number.

The user called to report that their air conditioner is not blowing air. The agent confirmed the user's contact details and service address, assured the issue would be relayed to the team, and concluded the call after the user had no further requests.
The agent greeted the user and immediately attempted to transfer the call to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was completed successfully shortly after the call began.

The user called to inquire about a scheduled service appointment and expressed a need to reschedule it. The call ended abruptly after the user attempted to communicate further but was not responded to.

Gregory Lords called to report that the water heater installed by Budget did not pass inspection due to the absence of a drip leg on the gas line. The agent confirmed the issue, collected the service address and contact details, and assured that the team would be notified to return and install the drip leg. The call concluded with no further requests from Gregory.

The user, Barb, called to make an appointment for air conditioner service due to noise issues after a recent part replacement. The agent scheduled a provisional appointment for Friday, July 17, 2026, at 8 AM and confirmed the details with Barb. The call concluded with Barb declining to provide feedback.

The user called to schedule a cooling service appointment under their home warranty with American Home Shield. The agent collected all necessary details but did not confirm a specific appointment time. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided feedback requesting an actual appointment time and date.
The user requested to speak to someone, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called to inquire about rescheduling an appointment to an earlier time. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Greg and Stephanie Collins called to request a service for their home warranty related to their AC unit, which is not shutting off and has a blank thermostat panel. The agent confirmed the details and dispatch number, scheduled service as soon as possible, and offered information about maintenance programs, which the user declined. The user provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The user requested the dispatch number, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to request immediate service for an AC unit that is not shutting off and a thermostat that is not displaying numbers. The agent gathered details about the issue and attempted to schedule a service visit but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to customer service.
The user requested customer service and the agent attempted to connect them with a live agent by transferring the call. The call was successfully transferred to another number.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to assist, but the call was quickly transferred to a live agent for further help. The user did not provide additional information before the transfer.
The user requested to speak with customer service, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.
The call was very brief with the user providing unintelligible audio and then hanging up shortly after the agent's greeting. No meaningful interaction or assistance was completed.

The user called to request a regular service appointment for a video cable recording of their kitchen stack. The agent gathered the user's name and ownership status but was unable to obtain the service address before the user ended the call. The user requested a callback to finalize the appointment details.

Malia from American Home Shield called to confirm details about an estimate for a blower motor replacement due to mold or mildew at 24 Biltmore Terrace in Belleville, Illinois. The agent confirmed the estimate amount and assured a follow-up on the next business day. The call ended with the user having no further questions and the agent providing contact information.

The user returned a call regarding service at their house and spoke briefly with the after-hours assistant, who offered to take details for a follow-up on the next business day. The call ended abruptly before the user could provide more information about the service request.
The user called Budget and requested to speak with a representative. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent to assist the user further.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for service assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, facilitated the transfer without any issues.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.

The user, Hoffman, called to request emergency HVAC service for a leaking PTAC unit that is causing damage to the property beneath theirs. The agent confirmed the details and transferred the call to a live agent for urgent assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to emergency support.
The user called to inquire about the arrival time of a maintenance person. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

The user, Riley Dozier, called to check the status of their service. The agent confirmed the user's identity and phone number but found no appointment on file. The agent then offered to leave a message or transfer to a live representative before the user hung up.
The user received a call from Budget regarding a water heater installed in 2022, which they did not recognize. The agent attempted to assist by transferring the call to a live agent for further help.
The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly without any meaningful interaction or resolution.

The user called and requested a callback, but the agent explained that outgoing calls are not possible and offered assistance during the call. The user did not specify any further requests before ending the call.

The user, Elizabeth Thompson, called to request a quote for cutting and replacing a leaking stack in her home. The agent successfully booked an appointment for Friday at 12 PM and informed her about the standard dispatch fee. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call politely.
The user called back after receiving a missed call from the agent and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 19 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

Deborah Peebles called to check if a technician was scheduled to come out today. The agent could not find an appointment under her information and offered to leave a message or transfer her to a live representative. Deborah requested a transfer, and the call was successfully transferred to a live agent.
The call was very brief and ended immediately after the agent's initial greeting and request for the service address ZIP code. The user did not respond or engage in the conversation.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call successfully to another agent.
The user, Janera, returned a phone call and was promptly transferred by the agent Sophie to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 17 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly after the agent's greeting without any further conversation.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to another agent. The initial agent facilitated the transfer promptly.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another representative. The transfer was completed successfully without further interaction.
